chief_complaint: An 11-year-old unmarried boy presented with generalized body weakness, severe continuous epigastric pain, nausea, and vomiting.
history: The patient was diagnosed with chronic pancreatitis in October 2018. He underwent yoga and shatkarma for 36 months, including shankprakshalan, kunjal, jalneti, vatkarma kapalbhati, and tratak.
exam: Vital signs and physical examination findings are not provided.
labs: Investigations and test results are not provided.
